# Assessment Overview

This page links to supplementary analysis documents generated for this assessment report.

- **[Architecture Diagram](architecture-diagram.md)** — Two-layer view of system architecture and component relationships.
- **[Dependency Map](dependency-map.md)** — External dependency categories, risks, and test dependency inventory.
- **[API & Service Communication Contracts](api-service-contracts.md)** — Endpoint inventory, communication patterns, and service interaction sequence.
- **[Data Architecture & Persistence Layer](data-architecture.md)** — Database configuration, entity model, repository patterns, and sensitivity notes.
- **[Configuration & Externalized Settings Inventory](configuration-inventory.md)** — Profiles, properties, startup requirements, and secrets handling inventory.
- **[Core Business Workflows](business-workflows.md)** — Primary business flows, decision logic, and workflow sequence diagram.
